name: Special Forces X
description: Special Forces X is an exciting action shooting game where you play as elite special forces to carry out missions to destroy the hideouts of dangerous criminals. Equipped with modern weapons, using tactical movement, and defeating enemies in intense battles. Each level is full of challenges, requiring quick reflexes and precise combat skills. Join Special Forces X and become the strongest special forces warrior!
instructions: W A S D or Arrow Keys to Move Space or F to Shoot
